title: Throwable Fire Charges
description: Adds a new item called the fireball which can be thrown similar to the fireballs in hypixel bedwars.
body:
### DESCRIPTION
This data pack adds throwable fire charges called fireballs inspired by hypixel bedwars. To make one, put a bow in the center slot of a crafting table, surround it with 4 fire charges and put 2 gunpowder and 2 ghast tear in opposite corners (refer to gallery for image). 

### INSTALLATION GUIDE

- go to your saves folder located here on Windows:
```
C:\Users(your name)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves
```
  put the zipped file in the data packs folder, and either restart your world or execute      /reload

  - If you'd like, you can install the optional resource pack. to do so, head to minecraft title screen, click options, click resource packs, open pack folder, then put the resource pack file there. Then go back to minecraft, however over the pack, and click > to move it to selected packs.

### OTHER THINGS TO NOTE
- When using pre 1.21 versions, surround a dispenser with 4 fire charges instead of the bow recipe 
- installing the resource pack is optional. If you don't, your fireball will look like a snowball, however it will still function as intended.
- Credits to wallibear for the fireball texture and icon. Link: https://wallibear.download/TP
- for feedback, bug reports, or other help, join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/kk3j3ct6xk) from the links section of this page!
